name: Copy.ai
description: An AI-powered copywriting platform designed for go-to-market teams. Copy.ai provides pre-built sales workflows for email generation, prospect research, account enrichment, and content creation at scale.
whyUseIt: Copy.ai is purpose-built for sales and marketing workflows, unlike general AI assistants. It offers pre-built templates for common sales tasks: cold email generation, LinkedIn outreach, follow-up sequences, and competitive analysis. For teams that want AI integrated into repeatable workflows rather than one-off conversations, Copy.ai provides structure and consistency.
aiCapabilities: Pre-built GTM workflows powered by AI: prospect research, email personalisation at scale, competitive analysis generation, and content repurposing for sales enablement.
funnelPosition: Top and mid-funnel — outbound content creation and prospect research
sellerWorkflow: SDRs use Copy.ai workflows to generate personalised email drafts at scale: input a list of prospects, and the AI researches each one and drafts a personalised email. AEs use it for follow-up messages, proposal sections, and competitive response templates.
managerExpects: AI-generated content is reviewed and personalised before sending. Copy.ai templates are refined based on what's working (open rates, reply rates) and shared across the team.
demoDescription: Run the prospect research workflow on a target account, generate a personalised cold email, create a LinkedIn outreach message, and draft a competitive comparison for a common competitor.

vocabulary.definition: A pre-built, multi-step AI process that chains together research, generation, and personalisation steps into a repeatable task.
Copy.ai's feature that learns your company's tone and style, ensuring all generated content sounds consistent.

beginnerMistakes: Using default templates without customising them for your product and buyer personas
Generating content at scale without quality-checking a sample first
Not feeding results data back into the workflow to improve output quality over time
